email.verification.title: Verify your email — eDemOS
email.verification.heading: Welcome to eDemOS!
email.verification.info: Your account is almost ready. Please verify your email address by clicking the button below:
email.verification.info2: If you did not create an account, you can safely ignore this email.
email.passwordReset.title: Password reset — eDemOS
email.passwordReset.heading: Password reset request
email.passwordReset.info: Click the button below to set a new password for your eDemOS account:
email.passwordReset.info2: If you did not request a password reset, you can safely ignore this email.
